'''gathada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoctokatal|yoctokatal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoctokatal|yoctokatal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gathada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæthædæth|gæthædæth]] || [[word:gæthædæj|gæthædæj]] || [[word:gæthædæsh|gæthædæsh]] || [[word:gæthædæ|gæthædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathathadath|gathathadath]] || [[word:gathathadaj|gathathadaj]] || [[word:gathathadash|gathathadash]] || [[word:gathathada|gathathada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathadath|gathadath]] || [[word:gathadaj|gathadaj]] || [[word:gathadash|gathadash]] || [[word:gathada|gathada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathafdath|gathafdath]] || [[word:gathafdaj|gathafdaj]] || [[word:gathafdash|gathafdash]] || [[word:gathafdaf|gathafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gathadatha|gathadatha]] || [[word:gathadaja|gathadaja]] || [[word:gathadasha|gathadasha]] || [[word:gathadaka|gathadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gathadath|gathadath]] || [[word:gathadaj|gathadaj]] || [[word:gathadash|gathadash]] || [[word:gathada|gathada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gathadathal|gathadathal]] || [[word:gathadajal|gathadajal]] || [[word:gathadashal|gathadashal]] || [[word:gathadakal|gathadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gathadathatha|gathadathatha]] || [[word:gathadajaja|gathadajaja]] || [[word:gathadashasha|gathadashasha]] || [[word:gathadaka|gathadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gathadathan|gathadathan]] || [[word:gathadajan|gathadajan]] || [[word:gathadashan|gathadashan]] || [[word:gathadakan|gathadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gathadathaoro|gathadathaoro]] || [[word:gathadajaoro|gathadajaoro]] || [[word:gathadashaoro|gathadashaoro]] || [[word:gathadakaoro|gathadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
